source.name: Lab 3.4: Hours flow (fill in the blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks to complete the hours flow YAML.** Use the exact words shown in the guidance so the LLM can match user messages about bank hours.
source.text:
Complete the flow that provides bank hours:

```yaml
<<<flows>>>:
  <<<hours>>>:
    name: bank hours
    description: <<<Provide bank opening hours and schedule.>>>
    steps:
      - action: <<<utter_hours>>>
```
source.distractors:
flow
balance
Tell the user when we're open.
utter_balance
action
source.guidance: The correct answers are: **flows** (top-level key), **hours** (flow name), **Provide bank opening hours and schedule.** (description the LLM uses to match), **utter_hours** (the response action). You will add this flow to your project in the next step.

blank: Provide bank opening hours and schedule.
